name: Dog Brew
short_description: Dog Brew - a light indie adventure where the main character, burdened by debts, decides to settle them through the art of brewing beer.
detailed_description:
My another game


About the Game

Welcome to a cozy island where adventures intertwine with the aromas of robust beer and friendships with adorable characters! In "Dog Brew," you step into the shoes of an unlucky yet charming dog-brewer, embarking on an exciting journey to pay off debts.

The island you find yourself on is a small piece of land inhabited by lively characters. Here, ordinary dogs and quirky individuals such as farmer dogs, sellers, mischievous kids, a human alcoholic, and even a pig-pirate call it home.

Create your unique brew using a variety of fruits, vegetables, and some unconventional ingredients not typically associated with beer production. Cultivate vegetables in your garden, breed fish in the game, and explore diverse drink recipes, each tailored to suit specific island residents. Experiment and surprise your customers!

Embark on your unique journey from debtor to a debt-free, happy brewer in Dog Brew.
